meaning: lamp 奥尔迪斯手提信号灯(舰船、飞机上用摩尔斯电码发信号时用的灯)
examples: Edwin Hodge, brother of series star Aldis Hodge, guest stars.
And it is only in the past ten years that the British navy has phased out its use of Aldis lamps to convey Morse code signals from ship to ship.

Aldis said not all companies are operating on thin margins.
"Sometimes the problem in disasters is that not requested and unneeded drugs are coming in, " said Aldis, who suggested that some companies used charitable donations as a form of tax relief.
